description: Main comparison re-run with per-edge crowd density generated by a Helbing social-force pedestrian simulation instead of the hand-authored field. Thermal model and planner unchanged. 5 envs x 24 missions, n=120.
crowd_model: social-force (Helbing & Molnar 1995 [15]); 140 agents/site spawned at POI hotspots; per-edge density = normalized agent count within 6 m of edge midpoint; 12 temporal snapshots

density_agreement.note: Both models concentrate density on hotspot edges (agreement in direction). Social-force is spikier: genuine congestion peaks up to 1.4 and empty peripheral edges, vs the smoother hand-authored 0.12-0.60 band. The thermal/energy ranking is unchanged under the more realistic field.
